description_long: This is a medium-sized red onion with a rounded, slightly flattened shape and a somewhat irregular surface. The outer skin is a mix of deep purples, reds, and maroons, with areas of lighter, almost silvery sheen, and some visible patches where the papery skin is peeling or missing. The base of the onion shows a dried, fibrous root tuft, while the top is closed and slightly pointed, with no visible green shoots. The surface texture appears to be a combination of smooth and slightly wrinkled, with the characteristic layered structure of an onion bulb subtly visible beneath the skin. The onion's coloration is variegated, with darker and lighter patches distributed unevenly across its surface. No urban elements or contextual clues are visible around the onion, suggesting it is isolated from its environment.
description: A medium-sized, variegated red onion with a papery, partially peeled skin and a dried root tuft at the base. The surface is a mix of deep purples and reds with subtle layering visible.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rounded side of the onion with a prominent patch of lighter, silvery-purple skin and some peeling at the lower edge.
description_view_1: The back view shows a darker, more uniform maroon coloration with a visible vertical crack and the dried root tuft at the base.
description_view_2: This side displays a broad, reddish-brown area with a smoother surface and less visible peeling, showing the bulb's curvature.
description_view_3: The base view focuses on the dried, fibrous root tuft and the concentric layering of the onion, with a mix of dark and reddish hues.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with subtle hints of layered segments beneath the skin, but no distinct lobes or separations are clearly visible.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is mostly intact but partially peeled in some areas, especially near the base, with a mix of purple, red, and silvery hues and a dry, flaky texture.
attribute_root_tuft: A dried, fibrous root tuft is present at the base, appearing short, dense, and light brown in color.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible emerging from the onion.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: No urban elements or contextual surfaces are visible; the onion appears isolated with no indication of its placement relative to urban features.
